text: Architecture hardened after the 14 Jul container-reclaim failure: project now restores itself from GitHub on any fresh container. This entry also tests the strategic-decision feed.

Morning check 14 Jul: all data fresh (crypto via Kraken OHLC, stocks at last close), no flags, no sleeve near DD limits. No action needed; second run of the morning after the 08:28 run — 0 new trades.

Verification run (manually fired by user from main session): full pipeline exercised end-to-end — restore check, Kraken OHLC refresh, quote ingest, data check clean, engine run, publish. Confirms the scheduled check-in works.

Pre-registered the day-90 evaluation framework (EVALUATION.md, backtest.py, evaluate.py). Criteria frozen before results exist: kill on cost >3%/yr or redundancy >0.90 corr; defect review below 0.60 backtest consistency; family tilts capped at 20%; no parameter edits to live sleeves, ever. Baseline backtest (Oct 25-Jul 26, crypto bear): only S2, S9, P5 positive; P9 registered as expected cost-kill.

Evening check 14 Jul (manually fired; schedule moved 21:15→20:15 UTC): data refresh clean — crypto via Kraken OHLC; NVDA/AAPL/MSFT include today's 14 Jul close, SPY's 14 Jul bar not yet in AV payload so SPY carries the 13 Jul close (not an error, AV publishes progressively after the bell). No flags, no sleeve near DD limits, all 20 sleeves active. Day-1 leaders are the crypto-heavy passives (P1 +4.5%, P6 +4.2%, P4 +4.1%) on the ETH bounce; laggard P3 (100% AAPL) -0.8%. 4 trades this run (S5 NVDA entry, P7 rebalance). No interventions.

Morning check 15 Jul: clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all sleeves active (none flattened). Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC; stocks at last close per morning rules. SPY still carries the 13 Jul close — verified via a TIME_SERIES_DAILY fetch that Alpha Vantage itself has 'Last Refreshed: 2026-07-13', so the lag is upstream, not our ingest; NVDA/AAPL/MSFT have 14 Jul closes. 5 trades this run (S4/S5/P7 adding BTC and ETH on crypto momentum). Equity 100,993.87 (+0.99%); leaders remain crypto-heavy passives P1 +5.0%, P6 +4.6%, P4 +4.4%; laggard P3 (100% AAPL) -0.8%. 7 sleeves still untriggered/in cash. No interventions.

Evening check 15 Jul: clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active. Full data refresh — crypto via Kraken OHLC; all four stocks now carry today's 15 Jul close (SPY's upstream AV lag resolved; re-fetched after initial payload stopped at 13 Jul). Equity 101,712.31 (+1.71%), account DD 0%. Leaders: P1 +6.1%, P6 +5.5%, P4 +5.4% — crypto-heavy passives extending the ETH rally (ETH +8.4% over 2 days). Laggard of the active sleeves: P7 ensemble +0.3%. AAPL +3.2% today lifted P3 out of last place. 11 trades this run (S4 NVDA entry, S5 SPY/AAPL entries, P1/P7 rebalances). 7 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P5,P9,P10) still untriggered/in cash — signal conditions not met, expected behavior. No interventions.

Morning check 16 Jul: clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.06%. Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC; stocks at 15 Jul close per morning rules. Equity 101,650.66 (+1.65%), slightly off yesterday evening's peak. 3 trades: P1 rotated SOL->AAPL (top-2 30d momentum ranking now BTC/AAPL - legitimate signal, verified against strategies.py, not a bug) and a small P7 BTC trim. Leaders P1 +5.8%, P6 +5.3%, P4 +5.1%; P7 ensemble +0.3% still trails its members. 7 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P5,P9,P10) remain untriggered/in cash. No interventions.

Evening check 16 Jul: clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.46%. Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (16 Jul live closes: BTC 64121.5, ETH 1870.32, SOL 75.67). Stock refresh degraded: Alpha Vantage SPY payload was stale (Last Refreshed 13 Jul, older than our stored 15 Jul bars) and NVDA/AAPL/MSFT fetches hit the rate-limit notice on 3 attempts, so all four stocks carry the 15 Jul close tonight - same upstream AV lag seen 14-15 Jul; will re-fetch at the morning run. 0 trades this run. Equity 101,241.88 (+1.24%), off yesterday's 101,712 peak on today's crypto pullback. Leaders P1 +4.5%, P4 +3.6%, P6 +3.3%; only negative sleeve S5 -0.03%; P7 ensemble +0.1% still trails its members. 7 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P5,P9,P10) untriggered/in cash. No interventions.

Morning check 17 Jul: clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.77%. Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC. Stock daily history still ends 15 Jul (yesterday evening's AV refresh failed upstream), so I pulled GLOBAL_QUOTE for all four symbols - quotes now carry the true 16 Jul closes (SPY 750.72, NVDA 207.40, AAPL 333.26, MSFT 401.10); history backfill deferred to the evening run per morning quota rules. Equity 100,931.04 (+0.93%), off the 15 Jul peak on the crypto pullback (BTC 62.9k, ETH 1831, SOL 74.5). 4 trades: P1 rebalance (trim AAPL, add ETH) and P7 exiting BTC/ETH. Leaders P3 +5.0% (AAPL), P1 +4.3%; worst S5 -0.57%; max sleeve DD 3.9% (P6), nothing near the 15% limit. 7 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P5,P9,P10) untriggered/in cash. No interventions.

Evening check 17 Jul: clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.74%. Full data refresh — crypto via Kraken OHLC; stock daily history fully backfilled through today's 17 Jul close (AV lag resolved; SPY needed a second fetch after a stale 13-Jul payload and NVDA hit one rate-limit notice, both retried clean). Equity 100,964.72 (+0.96%). 8 trades incl. two first-time activations: P5 opened its long-MSFT/short-AAPL pair and P9 entered BTC+ETH (35%/35%) — signal-driven per their rules; P9's weak backtest ranking noted 15 Jul is interim data and decides nothing before day 90. Also S5 exited SPY, P7 rotated down NVDA/MSFT. Leaders P3 +5.2% (AAPL), P1 +4.8%; worst S5 -0.98%; max sleeve DD 3.0% (P6), nothing near the 15% limit. 5 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P10) still untriggered/in cash. No interventions.

Morning check 19 Jul (Sun): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.40%. Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (18 Jul completed bars + live 19 Jul closes: BTC 64661, ETH 1867.88, SOL 76.06); stocks at 17 Jul close per weekend/morning rules. NOTE: no journal entries for 18 Jul — both Saturday check-ins appear not to have fired; no data was lost (Kraken backfilled the 18 Jul bar, stocks closed). Equity 101,309.94 (+1.31%). 3 trades: S1 entered ETH, P7 re-added small BTC/ETH. Leaders P1 +5.42%, P3 +5.13%; worst S5 -0.60%; no sleeve near the 15% limit. 5 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P10) untriggered/in cash. No interventions.

Evening check 19 Jul (Sun): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, 0 fills, account DD ~0.48% (equity 101227.40 vs peak 101712.31). Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (18 Jul completed bars; live 19 Jul closes BTC 64457.8, ETH 1862.31, SOL 75.89). Skipped Alpha Vantage fetches: weekend, stock history already complete through 17 Jul close — saves quota per runbook weekend rule.

Morning check 20 Jul (Mon): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.66%. Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (19 Jul completed bars + live 20 Jul closes: BTC 63910.6, ETH 1849.53, SOL 75.68); stocks at 17 Jul close per morning rules (market closed, quota saved). Equity 101,036.30 (+1.04%). 8 trades: P2 monthly-style rebalance (add SPY/SOL, trim AAPL/BTC/ETH), P7 exited BTC, P8 rotated MSFT->BTC. Leaders P3 +5.13% (AAPL) and P1 +4.90%; worst S5 -0.91%; max sleeve DD 2.53% (P6), nothing near the 15% limit. 5 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P10) untriggered/in cash. Weekly comparative review due this evening (Monday). No interventions.

Evening check 20 Jul (Mon): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.04% (equity 101,673.06, +1.67%). Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (20 Jul live closes: BTC 65179.1, ETH 1900.07, SOL 77.66). Stock refresh degraded: AV SPY payload was stale (ended 13 Jul, older than stored 17 Jul bars) and NVDA hit persistent rate-limit notices across 4 attempts spaced up to 90s - daily quota likely exhausted; skipped AAPL/MSFT per runbook, all four stocks carry the 17 Jul close tonight (today's 20 Jul session missing; will backfill at the next evening run, GLOBAL_QUOTE in the morning). 2 trades: P9 exited its BTC+ETH position after a 1-trading-day hold (signal-driven per its rules; round-trip fees ~7.7 on .5k notional - consistent with its pre-registered expected cost-kill profile, logged for the day-90 review, no intervention). No sleeves near DD limits. No interventions.

Weekly review (Mon 20 Jul, week 1 of the test): account equity 101,673.06 (+1.67% since 13 Jul start), fees 107.85, account DD 0.04%, kill switch off, no sleeve ever flattened. Best sleeves: P1 momentum top-2 +6.34%, P4 +5.34%, P6 +5.34%, P3 (100% AAPL) +5.13% - the week's gains came overwhelmingly from crypto-heavy passives riding the ETH rally (~+6% on the week) plus AAPL strength. Worst: S5 -0.24%, P7 -0.11%, P5 -0.05% - all essentially flat, nothing pathological. Ensemble P7 vs members: P7 is the notable laggard at -0.11% while its member sleeves average solidly positive; its frequent small rebalances have generated steady fees without capturing the trends its members rode - worth watching as a fee-drag case study, but per EVALUATION.md thresholds are frozen and interim rankings decide nothing before day 90. Activation breadth: 15 of 20 sleeves have traded; S2, S3, S8, S9, P10 remain untriggered/in cash - signal conditions simply have not met, expected for breakout/vol-regime styles in a range-bound tape. Risk: max sleeve DD this week ~3.9% intraweek (P6), currently all sleeves within 1% of their peaks - nothing approaching the 15% sleeve or 20% account limits. Data quality this week: Kraken OHLC flawless; Alpha Vantage repeatedly served stale SPY payloads and rate-limit notices (14, 16, 20 Jul) - mitigations (retry, GLOBAL_QUOTE fallback, quota discipline) held, stock history complete through 17 Jul with 20 Jul backfill pending. Saturday 18 Jul check-ins did not fire (scheduler gap, no data lost). No parameter changes; ideas logged to state/ideas.md only.

Morning check 21 Jul (Tue): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.00% - new equity peak 102,002.34 (+2.00%). Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (20 Jul completed bars + live 21 Jul closes: BTC 65890.0, ETH 1934.70, SOL 78.69). Stocks: history still ends 17 Jul (last night's AV quota exhaustion); tried GLOBAL_QUOTE for all four symbols this morning but every payload was cache-stale at 16 Jul (older than our stored 17 Jul closes), so ingesting them would have moved quotes backwards - skipped, all stocks stay at 17 Jul close; 20 Jul history backfill remains for the evening run. 4 trades: S1 added BTC (7-asset momentum), P1 small AAPL/ETH rebalance, P7 re-entered BTC. Leaders P1 +7.32%, P6 +6.84%, P4 +6.68% - crypto passives extending the BTC/ETH rally; only negatives P7 -0.07%, P5 -0.05%. Max sleeve DD 0.61% (S6), nothing near limits. 5 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P10) untriggered/in cash. No interventions.

Evening check 21 Jul (Tue): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, 0 fills, account DD 0.03% (equity 101,971.88, +1.97%). Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (20 Jul completed bars + live 21 Jul closes: BTC 66352.7, ETH 1920.75, SOL 77.86). Stock refresh FAILED again: AV SPY payload cache-stale (ended 13 Jul, no-op vs stored 17 Jul bars), NVDA rate-limited on 3 attempts spaced up to 75s - daily quota exhausted before the backfill could run, second consecutive evening. All four stocks still carry the 17 Jul close; sessions 20-21 Jul missing from stock history, so stock-sleeve signals are computing on Friday's bars. This is now a repeated data failure per runbook - flagging to the user tonight. No sleeves near DD limits, best P4 +7.04%, worst P7 -0.06%. No interventions.

Morning check 22 Jul (Wed): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.29% (equity 101,710.08, +1.71%). Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (21 Jul completed bars + live 22 Jul closes: BTC 65892.4, ETH 1917.62, SOL 77.21). Stock staleness partially REPAIRED: deviated from morning skip-stocks rule because history was 5d stale after two failed evening backfills - fetched TIME_SERIES_DAILY for all four (7 AV requests total incl. retries, within quota). AAPL and MSFT now current through 21 Jul close (327.74 / 397.75). SPY and NVDA still stuck at 17 Jul: AV served cache-stale payloads on repeated attempts (SPY 13 Jul then 17 Jul; NVDA 17 Jul after one rate-limit notice), and SPY GLOBAL_QUOTE was even older (16 Jul, would have moved the mark backwards) - discarded, both stay on verified 17 Jul closes; retry backfill at evening run. 3 trades: P5 re-established its short-AAPL leg, P7 trimmed AAPL / added ETH. Leaders P4 +6.71%, P1 +6.15%, P6 +6.12%; worst P7 -0.23%, S5 -0.06%. Max sleeve DD 1.80% (P3), nothing near limits. 5 sleeves (S2,S3,S8,S9,P10) untriggered/in cash. No parameter changes.

Evening check 22 Jul (Wed): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.16% (equity 101,834.19, +1.83%). Full data refresh - crypto via Kraken OHLC (21 Jul completed bars + live 22 Jul closes: BTC 65912.4, ETH 1927.20, SOL 77.80). Stock staleness fully RESOLVED: all four symbols now current through today's 22 Jul close (SPY 747.48, NVDA 212.06, AAPL 325.89, MSFT 390.34) - first fetch round served the usual stale-cache/rate-limit responses, but cache-busted retries after ~75s returned fresh payloads for all four; the 2-day SPY/NVDA gap (20-21 Jul) backfilled cleanly and datastore check shows 0d age across the board. 9 trades incl. first-time activation of P10 (entered its 6-asset spread: SPY/NVDA/AAPL/BTC/ETH/SOL) - signal-driven per its rules, leaving only S2,S3,S8,S9 never-triggered; also S7 added SPY, P7 re-added SPY/NVDA. Leaders P4 +6.60%, P6 +6.31%, P1 +5.85%; worst P7 -0.13% and P10 -0.07% (day-one fees); max sleeve DD 2.35% (P3), nothing near the 15% limit. No parameter changes; no interventions.

Morning check 23 Jul (Thu): clean run, no flags, kill switch off, all 20 sleeves active, account DD 0.25% (equity 101,749.23, +1.75%). Crypto refreshed via Kraken OHLC (22 Jul completed bars + live 23 Jul closes: BTC 65706.0, ETH 1922.39, SOL 77.46). Stocks skipped per morning rule (market closed; history current through 22 Jul close after last night's full repair, quota saved). 3 trades: P7 trimmed BTC/ETH, P10 trimmed BTC - routine rebalances. Leaders P4 +6.29%, P6 +5.95%, P1 +5.72%; worst P7 -0.18% and P10 -0.16% (both small fee drag). Max sleeve DD 2.35% (P3), nothing near the 15% limit. S2,S3,S8,S9 still untriggered/in cash. No parameter changes; no interventions.
